summary: Phone Number Mandatory Registration Feature Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Phone field is now REQUIRED for new registrations with proper validation in both frontend and backend. Existing users without phone can still login. Admin panel displays phone correctly.

registration_without_phone_blocked_backe.details: Backend returns 422 validation error when phone is missing from signup request

registration_with_empty_phone_blocked.details: Backend rejects empty string phone with 422 validation error

registration_with_whitespace_phone_block.details: Backend rejects whitespace-only phone with 422 validation error

registration_with_short_phone_blocked.details: Backend rejects phone with fewer than 6 digits with 422 validation error

registration_with_valid_phone_succeeds.details: Registration with valid phone (+39, +49, +1 formats) returns 201 Created

frontend_phone_field_required.details: Phone input has required attribute and HTML5 validation prevents submission

frontend_shows_validation_error.details: Frontend displays 'Please enter a valid phone number' for short phone

existing_user_login.details: User ashleyalt005@gmail.com (without phone) can still login successfully

admin_users_phone_column.details: Phone column visible in Admin Users table with proper display

admin_users_phone_placeholder.details: Users without phone show dash (—) placeholder in table

admin_user_detail_phone.details: User detail view shows phone field correctly

admin_sections_load.details: All admin sections (Overview, KYC Queue, Accounts, Transfers, Support, Audit) load correctly

POST /api/v1/auth/signup with valid phon.details: User created successfully with phone stored

POST /api/v1/auth/login for existing use.details: Backward compatibility maintained - existing users can login

GET /api/v1/admin/users.details: Returns phone field for each user (null for users without phone)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend SignupRequest schema correctly uses Pydantic field_validator for phone validation
Phone validation ensures: non-empty, stripped, at least 6 digits
Frontend validates phone before API call with same rules (>= 6 digits)
HTML5 required attribute provides first-line browser validation
Translation keys added for phoneRequired and phoneInvalid in both EN and IT
Admin Users page correctly shows phone column with placeholders for null values
Backward compatibility preserved - existing users without phone can login/operate
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created for validation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone validation for registration is fully implemented and tested. Backend uses Pydantic field_validator on SignupRequest.phone that rejects empty/whitespace/short phones. Frontend has matching JavaScript validation. Admin panel shows phone column. Translation keys phoneRequired and phoneInvalid added to translations.js. All admin sections continue to work correctly. Test users created: test_phone_reg_*@example.com

backend_validation.logic: field_validator('phone') strips whitespace, checks non-empty, validates >= 6 digits

frontend_validation.logic: handleSubmit validates trimmedPhone is non-empty and has >= 6 digits

frontend_input.logic: Phone input has type='tel', required attribute, data-testid='signup-phone'
